creator: alie@affle.com
text:
Here we go (Do you need dmesg ?)
General

   - *Platform Technology* Intel Centrino Duo
   - *Windows Vista Certification* Windows Vista Capable
   - *Built-in Devices* Wireless LAN antenna,
   Stereo speakers
   - *Embedded Security* Fingerprint reader
   - *Width* 12.0 in
   - *Depth* 8.9 in
   - *Height* 1.3 in
   - *Weight* 4.4 lbs
   - *Color* Silver
   - *Localization* English
   - *Notebook type* Vista certified system,
   Thin-and-light (4-6 lbs.)
   - *Screen type* Widescreen
   - *Wireless capabilities* IEEE 802.11g,
   IEEE 802.11b,
   Bluetooth

Processor

   - *Processor* Intel Core Duo T2300E / 1.66 GHz
   - *Multi-Core Technology* Dual-Core
   - *Data Bus Speed* 667.0 MHz
   - *Features* Execute Disable Bit capability,
   Enhanced SpeedStep technology,
   Power-optimized processor system bus
   - *Chipset Type* Mobile Intel 945GM Express

Cache Memory

   - *Type* L2 cache
   - *Installed Size* 2.0 MB

RAM

   - *Installed Size* 512.0 MB / 2.0 GB (max)
   - *Technology* DDR2 SDRAM - 667.0 MHz
   - *Memory Specification Compliance* PC2-5300
   - *Form Factor* SO DIMM 200-pin

Environmental Parameters

   - *Environmental standards* EPA Energy Star,
   RoHS

Storage Controller

   - *Storage controller type* Serial ATA/IDE
   - *Storage Controller / Serial ATA Interface* Serial ATA-300

Storage

   - *Floppy Drive* None
   - *Hard Drive* 80.0 GB - Serial ATA-150 - 5400.0 rpm
   - *Storage Removable* None
   - *Hard drive type* Portable

Optical Storage (2nd)

   - *2nd optical storage type* None

Optical Storage

   - *Type* CD-RW / DVD-ROM combo - Integrated
   - *Read Speed* 24x (CD) / 8x (DVD)
   - *Write Speed* 24x
   - *Rewrite Speed* 24x

Card Reader

   - *Card reader type* 5 in 1 card reader
   - *Supported flash memory cards* SD Memory Card,
   xD-Picture Card,
   MultiMediaCard,
   Memory Stick,
   Memory Stick PRO

Display

   - *Display Type* 12.1 in TFT active matrix
   - *Max Resolution* 1280 x 800 ( WXGA )
   - *Widescreen Display* Yes
   - *Color Support* 24-bit (16.7 million colors)
   - *Features* VibrantView

Video

   - *Graphics Processor / Vendor* Intel GMA 950 Dynamic Video Memory
   Technology 3.0

Audio

   - *Audio Output* Sound card
   - *Audio Codec* Realtek ALC883
   - *Features* High Definition Audio
   - *Audio Input* Stereo microphone

Input Device(s)

   - *Input device type* Touchpad,
   Keyboard

Telecom

   - *Modem* Fax / modem
   - *Max Transfer Rate* 56.0 Kbps
   - *Protocols & Specifications* ITU V.90
   - *Features* V.92 upgradable

Networking

   - *Networking* Network adapter
   - *Wireless LAN Supported* Yes
   - *Wireless NIC* Intel PRO/Wireless 3945ABG
   - *Data Link Protocol* Fast Ethernet,
   IEEE 802.11a,
   Ethernet,
   IEEE 802.11b,
   IEEE 802.11g,
   Bluetooth 2.0 EDR
   - *Compliant Standards* IEEE 802.11g,
   IEEE 802.11b,
   IEEE 802.11a

Expansion / Connectivity

   - *Expansion Slot(s)* 2.0 (total) / 1.0 (free) x ExpressCard/54 - SO
   DIMM 200-pin,
   1.0 (total) / 1.0 (free) x SD Memory Card,
   1.0 (total) / 1.0 (free) x xD-Picture Card,
   1.0 (total) / 1.0 (free) x Memory Stick,
   1.0 (total) / 1.0 (free) x Memory
   - *Interfaces* 1.0 x IEEE 1394 (FireWire) - Input - 4 pin USB Type A,
   1.0 x Headphones - Ethernet 10Base-T/100Base-TX - Mini-phone stereo 3.5
   mm,
   3.0 x Modem - Phone line - RJ-45,
   1.0 x Network - Output - 15 pin HD D-Sub (HD-15),
   1.0 x Microphone - VGA - RJ-11,
   1.0 x Hi-Speed USB - 4 pin FireWire,
   1.0 x Display / video - Mini-phone 3.5 mm

Miscellaneous

   - *Features* Security lock slot (cable lock sold separately),
   Administrator password,
   InstantOn,
   Hard drive password,
   Power-on password
   - *Compliant Standards* CE,
   CER,
   UL 60950,
   IEC 60950,
   MPR II,
   CSA 22.2 No. 950,
   RoHS,
   FCC Part 15 B,
   VCCI Class B ITE,
   CCC,
   SASO,
   BSMI,
   CISPR 22 Class B,
   NOM

Power

   - *Power Device* External
   - *Voltage Required* AC 120/230 V ( 50/60 Hz )

Battery

   - *Technology* 3-cell Lithium ion
   - *Installed Qty* 1.0 / 1.0 (max)
   - *Capacity* 2600.0 mAh
   - *Run Time (Up To)* 2.2 hour(s)
